name: Tarvo
flavor_text: A dishevelled merchant sits slumped against the wall, clearly shaken.

dialogue.greeting: You found me! I feared no one would come. Please, ask me what HAPPENED.
dialogue.unknown: I know not of what you speak.

happened.response: I was ambushed on the road by a BANDIT gang. Their LEADER took my LEDGER — it holds every trade debt I am owed. Without it I am ruined. I barely escaped with my life.

bandit.response: Their leader is a scarred brute who makes camp to the south. He will not give up that ledger willingly.

leader.response: Their leader is a scarred brute who makes camp to the south. He will not give up that ledger willingly.

ledger.response: My ledger is a leather-bound book with my trading company seal. If you recover it, bring it to OLWEN at the inn — she will know how to reach me. Or... keep it, if the knowledge within is of use to you.

olwen.response: Olwen at the inn is trustworthy. She will see the ledger returned safely if you bring it to her.

mine.response: I dare not go back that way. The bandits camp somewhere south of the old mine road.
